timestampConvention: global as_of timestamp with finalized per-chain component timestamps in UTC
numericPolicy: integer base units only; decimal formatting at presentation boundaries
coveragePolicy: global values identify expected, included, stale, missing, and unreconciled chains; partial coverage is never complete

metrics.unavailableWhen: any material deployment is missing or bridge accounting can double count circulation

metrics.source: usdp_global_total_supply and attributed timestamped USDp price
metrics.unavailableWhen: global supply is incomplete or price evidence is stale

metrics.source: aligned chain totalAssets and timestamped USDp prices
metrics.unavailableWhen: any of the five official savings chains is missing, stale, or unreconciled

metrics.source: chain Savings.Accrued events and pending-yield boundary reads

metrics.unavailableWhen: chain windows are not time-aligned or any savings chain is incomplete

metrics.source: chain rate state and reconciled share-price observations
metrics.formula: annualized exact share-price return over the selected trailing window

metrics.source: aligned chain APY and chain TVL components
metrics.unavailableWhen: any material savings-chain APY or TVL component is unavailable

metrics.classificationRule: never count bridge movement as issuer issuance or redemption

metrics.source: chain ERC-4626 Deposit and Withdraw events
